site.title: Neft Hub
site.eyebrow: Neft Hub · One Cloudflare Pages Home Base
site.description: One simple hub for classroom apps, student practice tools, GitHub navigation, notebook and lesson-plan engines, Hebrew/family learning, and Cloudflare deployment links.

apps.title: Neft Hub Control Center
apps.description: The single starting page for GitHub navigation, Cloudflare links, notebook and lesson-plan engines, student app folders, and cleanup workflow rules.

apps.title: Grade 6 Math Units 1–10 Hub
apps.description: A cleaned-up unit-by-unit launch hub for Grade 6 math apps, with existing apps linked and missing unit slots clearly marked.

apps.title: Noam Hebrew Practice Hub
apps.description: The single organized home for Noam's Hebrew practice: Ki Teitzei trope and chanting, prayer reading with transliteration, Units 5.3–5.4 vocabulary, quiz practice, and study-guide review.
